title: Pick default OCI Runtime from containers.conf
body: Cherry-pick     "Pick default OCI Runtime from containers.conf"

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fbuildah). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/release-1.19/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

Tests are unhappy, I think due to the missing verison in the spec.  Beyond that, I really much prefer having the Buildah version bump in their own PR, then any cherry picks in a separate.  That way you can more easily find the cherrypick PR in GitHub's PR list.

LGTM
@containers/build-maintainers another LGTM for the merge win please?
